zh.lifeSummary: 當George Lister Morrison Sr於1550年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格萬時，他的父親John Morrison II30歲，母親Beatrix Hill30歲。他和Morrison至少有1個兒子。他去世於1620年8月15日在英國北愛爾蘭貝爾法斯特享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the city of Leicester. The place name is recorded in the 10th century as Ligora cæster, representing a British name of obscure origin + Old English cæster ‘Roman fort’.

en.lifeSummary: When George Lister Morrison Sr was born in 1550, in Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, John Morrison II, was 30 and his mother, Beatrix Hill, was 30. He had at least 1 son with Morrison. He died on 15 August 1620, in Belfast, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Lister Morrison Sr est né en 1550, à Govan, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, John Morrison II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Hill, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Morrison. Il est décédé le 15 août 1620, à Belfast, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Lister Morrison Sr 1550 in Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Morrison II 30 und seine Mutter Beatrix Hill 30. Er hatte mit Morrison mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. August 1620 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Belfast, Nordirland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: George Lister Morrison Srが1550年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアゴヴァンで生まれた時，父John Morrison IIは30歳，母Beatrix Hillは30歳であった。彼はMorrisonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1620年8月15日にイギリス北アイルランドベルファストで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Lister Morrison Sr(이)가 1550년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 고반에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Morrison II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Hill(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Morrison(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1620년 8월 15일 영국 북아일랜드 벨파스트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
